title: INSERT OR REPLACE with a foreign key constraint leads to assertion fault
poc: CREATE TABLE Foo (Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ParentId INTEGER REFERENCES Foo(Id) ON DELETE CASCADE, C1);
REPLACE INTO Foo(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (1, null, 'A');
REPLACE INTO Foo(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (2, 1, 'A-2-1');
REPLACE INTO Foo(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (3, 2, 'A-3-2');
REPLACE INTO Foo(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (4, 3, 'A-4-3');
REPLACE INTO Foo(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (2, 3, 'A-2-3');
CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, parent REFERENCES t1 ON DELETE CASCADE);
key_bug_features: INSERT OR REPLACE with foreign key constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Bar (Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ParentId INTEGER REFERENCES Bar(Id) ON DELETE SET NULL, C1 TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO Bar(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (1, NULL, 'Root');
INSERT INTO Bar(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (2, 1, 'Child 1');
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO Bar(Id, ParentId, C1) VALUES (2, 3, 'Updated Child 1');
